title: Release Configured User
objective: A user state with release-track metadata present, used to verify release-aware update paths do not lose user intent.

setup.title: Write Kova Release-Track Fixture
setup.intent: Create Kova-owned release-track fixture metadata without writing product-shaped OpenClaw config.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; const dir=path.join(home,".kova"); fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,"release-track.json"),JSON.stringify({schemaVersion:"kova.fixture.release-track.v1",releaseTrack:"beta"},null,2));'

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes state fixture files
